The Monitoring Blind Spot

30–40% of critical rotating equipment runs without condition monitoring. Discover why—and how to fix it.

The Hidden Threat

Submerged pumps. Enclosed drives. ATEX motors. Gearboxes in harsh environments. Equipment that's "too difficult to monitor" sits idle in your plant, running blind—until catastrophic failure.

When it fails, production stops. Repair costs spike. Supply chains break. Your team scrambles.

This equipment shouldn't be invisible.

Submerged Pumps

Underwater and flooded environments have always meant no condition monitoring. Until now. Non-intrusive electrical monitoring works through water.

Enclosed Drives

Motors and gearboxes sealed in enclosures reject vibration sensors. Electrical Signature Analysis penetrates the enclosure—no modification needed.

ATEX & Hazardous Zones

Explosive atmospheres forbid certain hardware. ESA needs no additional sensors or power—just the motor's electrical signature.

The Cost of Blindness

Unexpected downtime of a critical pump or drive costs your operation more than early detection ever would:

€50K+
Avg. unplanned downtime cost
72h
Typical repair turnaround
2–5x
Emergency repair premium

Monitoring one blind-spot asset typically pays for itself after a single prevented failure.

The Solution: Electrical Signature Analysis

Samotics' Confidence Whispers uses ESA to monitor equipment that conventional sensors can't reach:

No Installation Burden

Tap into the motor's electrical signal. No vibration probes. No IP-rated hardware in hazardous zones. Non-intrusive, non-invasive.

Early Warning

Catch bearing wear, shaft misalignment, and cavitation weeks before failure. Plan maintenance. Avoid surprises.

Continuous Insight

Monitor from commissioning to decommissioning. Real-time alerts. Historical trend data. Root-cause analysis baked in.

Why Samotics?

  • Domain expertise: Electrical engineers who invented ESA and scaled it in industry.
  • Proven at scale: Monitoring thousands of assets across oil & gas, water, manufacturing, and utilities.
  • Compliance-first: Built for safety-critical sectors. Audit trails, API documentation, and standards alignment included.
  • Flexible deployment: Edge, cloud, or hybrid. API-first architecture. Integrates with your DCS, SCADA, or ERP.

End the Blind Spot

Let's talk about the critical equipment you're currently flying blind with.
